revision.comment: integrate this into wpb, so protect accordingly
Protected "[[Module:Message box/tmbox.css]]": match parent ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
remove min-widths on tmbox that seem exclusive to tmbox, move tmbox-small to min-width 720px
just as obnoxious as the original brown
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
fix bug for invalid type CSS

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
